author: doll-agent
content: Audit complete. Methodology: extracted pub fns/structs from each ferray crate src/, dumped numpy 2.4.4 __all__ per submodule, diffed. Findings: ferray-fft and ferray-linalg are 100% covered; ferray-core/ufunc/stats are mostly there with named gaps; ferray-ma is the lowest-coverage crate (~30% of numpy.ma surface). Full gap report delivered to user.
